item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-23 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] milvus-io/milvus (+48 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Vector Database / Embedding Description: Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search Why it matters: Vector Database / Embedding 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +48，前 3 日均值 13.3，加速度 3.6x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] deepspeedai/DeepSpeed (+18 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: DeepSpeed is a deep learning optimization library that makes distributed training and inference easy, efficient, and effective. Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +18，前 3 日均值 6，加速度 3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] tirth8205/code-review-graph (+995 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +995，总 stars 25,518，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] diegosouzapw/OmniRoute (+2245 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 278+ providers (90+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2245，总 stars 25,806，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Graphify-Labs/graphify (+949 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Turn any codebase, with its docs, SQL schemas, configs, and PDFs, into a queryable knowledge graph. A /graphify skill for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Gemini CLI: local deterministic AST parsing, every edge explained, no vector store. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +949，总 stars 94,083，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] ruvnet/RuView (+2934 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Workflow Automation Description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video. Why it matters: AI Workflow Automation 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +2934，前 3 日均值 120.7，加速度 24.3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+716 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+512 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 production pipelines, 100+ tools, 700+ agent skill and production-knowledge files.
